case_title: WINTON PROPERTIES, INC. vs. NOR-CAL KITCHEN & BATH, INC.

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NOR-CAL KITCHEN & BATH, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINTON PROPERTIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NOR-CAL KITCHEN & BATH, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINTON PROPERTIES, INC. SERVED APR-23-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NOR-CAL KITCHEN & BATH, INC.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $131.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINTON PROPERTIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NOR-CAL KITCHEN & BATH, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINTON PROPERTIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOR-CAL KITCHEN & BATH, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 383 RHODE ISLAND STREET, 1ST FLOOR SHOWROOM, LEASE FORFEITED
